message:
feat(python): numpy.flip wrapper parity (franken_numpy-bncb)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.flip(m, axis=None) so axis-wise
reversal matches numpy across axis=None (reverse all dimensions),
single-axis int, axis tuple, and any input dimensionality. Test
covers 1-D reverse, 2-D axis=0/1, axis=None, axis tuple (0, 1),
3-D mixed-axis flip across all valid axes, and float dtype parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
